violations.text: The following non-food contact surfaces: -fan covers in walk-in cooler -vents in ware washing area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

The following physical facilities is in poor repair: -wall coving is missing and a stained ceiling tile located in bathroom -tile missing/cracked located at back door entrance -vent covering hanging off ceiling in ware washing area The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2026

The floor located in 3-bay sink area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
